profile.name: Hello, i'm Deimer Hernandez
profile.description: I'm Full stack Developer and I enjoy create web applications

about.description: I started my trajectory as programming teacher  two years ago, I'm looking for an opportunity to gain experience as a software developer. I am currently studying English and doing homework maintenance in third-party web applications.

portafolio.title: Portafolio
portafolio.project_one_description: In this project I took into account principles of responsive design and handling of html, javascript and css.
portafolio.project_two_description: Challenge implemented in the Oracle next education program.
portafolio.project_three_description: With this project I put into practice the management of components, routes, third-party libraries, infinite scroll and api consumption.
